## Result

## Verdict

- [ ] Supports the conjecture
- [ ] Refutes the conjecture
- [ ] Inconclusive (reason: ...)

## What this changes

<!-- If supports: what's now load-bearing. If refutes: what should this repo retract. If inconclusive: what would resolve it. -->
